visual_description:
A static, medium-long shot shows a young man from behind, standing in the center of a vast, dimly lit stone hall. He is framed by large, dark pillars on either side. He wears a brown jacket and dark pants. The hall has a greenish, somber tone, with a large, rough stone wall directly in front of him. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The audio is filled with a low, somber, and atmospheric musical score. The music is slow and melancholic, creating a sense of quiet contemplation and slight unease, as if in a vast, empty, and mysterious space. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the atmospheric music to dominate the soundscape.

The camera cuts to a medium close-up of the young man's face. He is now facing the camera, revealing he is Harry Potter, with his signature round glasses and dark hair. He is wearing a brown zip-up jacket over a blue t-shirt. The background remains the same dark, stone archway, now softly out of focus. Harry has a look of concern and determination on his face. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner. The
